schema.title: Response List Detached Tasks Detached Tasks Get

get.description:
Synchronously query a detached task's logs and status.
Returns the latest output and task metadata.

parameters.name: offset

schema.description: Byte offset to read from log file
schema.title: Offset

parameters.description: Byte offset to read from log file

delete.description: Synchronously terminate a detached task and cleanup its resources.

post.description: Scan a device for active detached tasks and sync the registry.

get.description: Fetch a staged download file by its ID (relative path in downloads directory).

BatchFailedItem.title: BatchFailedItem
BatchFailedItem.description: Item representing a failed job submission in a batch.

BulkDeviceRequest.title: BulkDeviceRequest
BulkDeviceRequest.description:
Extended device request for bulk operations.
Allows per-device command/config override.

credential.description: External credential reference to populate connection_args

config.title: Config
config.description: configuration to apply (exclusive with command field)

command.title: Command
command.description: Command to execute (exclusive with config field)

queue_strategy.description: Queue strategy (fifo/pinned). Auto-selected by driver if not specified

execution_timeout.title: Execution Timeout
execution_timeout.description: Execution Timeout: Maximum execution time of the job in seconds

result_ttl.title: Result Ttl
result_ttl.description: Result retention time in seconds. If not set, uses system default. Useful for long-running tasks that need result retention (e.g., 48-hour stress tests)

detach.title: Detach
detach.description: Run command in background and return a Task ID immediately

push_interval.title: Push Interval
push_interval.description: Interval (seconds) for incremental webhook log pushes. Requires detach=True

staged_file_id.title: Staged File Id
staged_file_id.description: Internal reference to the staged file (Multipart mode)

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Device list for batch operation. Each device can override connection_args and optionally override command/config from base request

credential.description: External credential reference to populate connection_args

ConnectionTestRequest.title: ConnectionTestRequest
ConnectionTestRequest.description: Request model for device connection testing

latency.title: Latency
latency.description: Time taken to establish the connection in seconds

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the connection failed

result.description: Device information if the connection succeeded

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Timestamp of the test result is generated

ConnectionTestResponse.title: ConnectionTestResponse
ConnectionTestResponse.description: Response model for device connection testing

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Provider-specific reference (e.g., secret path or ID)

mount.title: Mount
mount.description: Optional mount point or backend name

field_mapping.title: Field Mapping
field_mapping.description: Mapping from provider fields to connection_args keys

CredentialRef.title: CredentialRef
CredentialRef.description: Reference to a credential entry resolved by credential providers.

credential.description: External credential reference to populate connection_args

DetachedTaskDiscoveryRequest.title: DetachedTaskDiscoveryRequest
DetachedTaskDiscoveryRequest.description: Request model for detached task discovery on a device

DetachedTaskInResponse.title: DetachedTaskInResponse
DetachedTaskInResponse.description: Metadata for a detached task, with sensitive data masked.

driver.description: Driver name used in the test

DeviceTestInfo.title: DeviceTestInfo
DeviceTestInfo.description: Base model for device connection test results.

DriverArgs.title: DriverArgs
DriverArgs.description:
This is a generic model for driver arguments.
Depends on the driver's method, the arguments can be different.

DriverExecutionResult.title: DriverExecutionResult
DriverExecutionResult.description: Standardized result for a single command or config operation.

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: Transfer operation type: upload or download

local_path.title: Local Path
local_path.description: Local file path. For download, use staged task folder if not provided.

sync_mode.title: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: Sync mode: full (always transfer) or hash (skip if MD5 matches)

execute_after_upload.title: Execute After Upload
execute_after_upload.description: Whether to execute execute_command after upload

cleanup_after_exec.title: Cleanup After Exec
cleanup_after_exec.description: Cleanup the file if execution succeeds

FileTransferModel.title: FileTransferModel
FileTransferModel.description:
Standardized model for file transfer operations.
Moved to top-level citizen for better API consistency.

TemplateParseRequest.title: TemplateParseRequest
TemplateParseRequest.description: Base request model for template parsing

TemplateRenderRequest.title: TemplateRenderRequest
TemplateRenderRequest.description: Base request model for template rendering

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: Cookies to send with the request
